content: TASK-037 interrupt done: expandable nodes/zones/subgraphs now expose hover affordance, and render transitions in <archmap-viewer>, index.html, and examples/demo.html show a short loading spinner for view/render-mode/overlay/render changes. Browser automation against examples/demo.html timed out during click verification, but tests/build/static checks passed. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
